all.en: Interviewer: Good morning, Ms. Carter, and thank you for coming in today.
all.zh: 面試官：早安，卡特小姐，感謝您今天前來。

all.en: Candidate: Good morning, Mr. Reynolds. It is a pleasure to finally meet you in person.
all.zh: 應徵者：早安，雷諾茲先生。很高興終於能與您本人見面。

all.en: Interviewer: To start, could you briefly walk me through your professional background?
all.zh: 面試官：首先，能否請您簡要介紹一下您的職業背景？

all.en: Candidate: Certainly. I have spent the last six years in digital marketing, most recently as a senior associate at Brightway Media.
all.zh: 應徵者：當然。我過去六年都在數位行銷領域工作，最近的職位是 Brightway Media 的資深專員。

all.en: Candidate: There I managed campaigns for three major consumer brands and oversaw a budget of approximately two million dollars.
all.zh: 應徵者：在那裡我負責三個主要消費品牌的行銷活動，並管理約兩百萬美元的預算。

all.en: Interviewer: That is impressive experience. What types of campaigns are you most proud of?
all.zh: 面試官：這樣的經歷令人印象深刻。您最引以為傲的是哪類型的行銷活動？

all.en: Candidate: I led an integrated social media launch that increased our client engagement rate by forty-two percent within one quarter.
all.zh: 應徵者：我曾主導一場整合性的社群媒體上線活動，在一季內讓客戶互動率提升了百分之四十二。

all.en: Interviewer: Can you tell me about a time when you faced a significant challenge while working with a team?
all.zh: 面試官：能否分享一個您在團隊合作中面臨重大挑戰的經驗？

all.en: Candidate: Last year, two team members strongly disagreed about the creative direction for a product relaunch.
all.zh: 應徵者：去年，有兩位團隊成員對某項產品重新上市的創意方向有強烈分歧。

all.en: Candidate: I scheduled a structured workshop where each side presented data supporting their proposal.
all.zh: 應徵者：我安排了一場有架構的工作坊，讓雙方各自提出支持自己提案的數據。

all.en: Candidate: We reached a hybrid concept that ultimately outperformed our original sales forecast by eighteen percent.
all.zh: 應徵者：我們最終達成了一個混合方案，銷售表現超過原先預測達百分之十八。

all.en: Interviewer: Excellent. How do you typically measure the success of a marketing initiative?
all.zh: 面試官：非常好。您通常如何衡量一項行銷活動的成功？

all.en: Candidate: I rely on a combination of return on investment, customer acquisition cost, and long-term brand sentiment.
all.zh: 應徵者：我會綜合運用投資報酬率、顧客獲取成本，以及長期品牌好感度等指標。

all.en: Interviewer: What are your long-term career goals?
all.zh: 面試官：您的長期職涯目標是什麼？

all.en: Candidate: Within five years, I hope to lead a global marketing division and mentor emerging professionals in the field.
all.zh: 應徵者：未來五年內，我希望能領導一個全球行銷部門，並指導業界的新進專業人才。

all.en: Interviewer: Our position would certainly offer growth opportunities in that direction.
all.zh: 面試官：我們這個職位確實能在這個方向上提供成長機會。

all.en: Interviewer: Now, may I ask what salary range you are expecting?
all.zh: 面試官：那麼，可以請問您期望的薪資範圍嗎？

all.en: Candidate: Based on my research of comparable roles, I am looking for a base salary between ninety and one hundred thousand dollars annually.
all.zh: 應徵者：根據我對類似職位的研究，我期望的年度基本薪資介於九萬至十萬美元之間。

all.en: Candidate: However, I am open to discussion depending on the overall benefits package.
all.zh: 應徵者：不過，視整體福利方案而定，我也願意進一步討論。

all.en: Interviewer: That figure is within our budgeted range, and we also offer performance bonuses and stock options.
all.zh: 面試官：這個數字在我們預算範圍內，我們同時提供績效獎金與股票選擇權。

all.en: Candidate: That sounds very attractive, and I would welcome the opportunity to learn more about the complete package.
all.zh: 應徵者：聽起來非常吸引人，我很樂意進一步了解完整的方案內容。

all.en: Interviewer: Wonderful. Do you have any questions for me at this point?
all.zh: 面試官：太好了。目前您對我有任何問題嗎？

all.en: Candidate: Yes, could you describe the team I would be working with most closely?
all.zh: 應徵者：有的，能否請您描述一下我將最密切合作的團隊？

all.en: Interviewer: Of course. We will discuss that in detail, and then I will introduce you to the department director.
all.zh: 面試官：當然可以。我們會詳細討論這部分，接著我會介紹您認識部門總監。

all.en: Candidate: Thank you very much. I appreciate your time and consideration today.
all.zh: 應徵者：非常感謝。感謝您今天撥冗與我深入交流。
